detail: Users field is blank, so the center cannot be attributed to an end user without adding an external assumption.
Users field lists multiple users, so the site is split by building to stay MECE instead of allocating the entire center to one company.
Users field lists OpenAI, Microsoft. All capacity is assigned to OpenAI because the request requires a primary-only, non-overlapping allocation.
Users field is blank, so the center cannot be attributed to an end user without adding an external assumption.
